docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,930.00 FILED BY LEE, ALFRED AS TO DEFENDANT FINCHER, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SPOKE WITH AN INDIVIDUAL WHO IDENTIFIED THEMSELVES AS THE RECECPTIONIST AND THEY STATED SUBJUECT NO LONGER EMPLOYED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ALFRED AS TO DEFENDANT FINCHER, DAVID

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALFRED LEE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID FINCHER IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
